The 40-day contact. This is 11 contacts plus a few in a 40-day period of time. Again, we've used variety, we've used strategies. Today I'm going to go straight for the heart. You could leave a message, you could send an email right here thinking about you call. It's at 40 days. We're going to get this deal. Don't give up. Okay? I'll see you at 50 days.
